name: google-calendar-event-creator
description: Chrome extension that creates a pre-filled Google Calendar event from the event details on the current web page.

_dependencyNotes.jsdom: Test-only. Provides a DOM implementation (test/harness.js) so the unmodified extractor scripts can be run and asserted against in Node, exactly as they execute in a browser. Not shipped with the extension. Currently at the latest release (29.1.1) with 0 known vulnerabilities per `npm audit` (checked 2026-06-13).
